lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. Did you manage to find out any more about that gryphon?

lines.speaker: Elder Korel
lines.text: I'm afraid not. I heard that Floopa might have an idea about that ship you saw. We will have to hope she is able to come up with something.

lines.speaker: Elder Korel
lines.text: In the meantime, I will remain here. The others may need support if another gryphon attacks. Until next time, human.
